items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• Do you speak Portuguese at home?
• Do you work in the morning?
• Do you drink tea with your friends?
• Do you speak English with your brother?
• 1. Do you speak English? / French / Portuguese.

items.text: Do you speak Portuguese at home?
Do you work in the morning?
Do you drink tea with your friends?

items.answer: Do you speak English with your brother?
1. Do you speak English? / French / Portuguese.

items.text: Do you speak Portuguese at home?
